segments.text: Yeah, early on Kuumaar's obviously gunning for that one hit
segments.original_text: 序盤はそうですねなんかクーマ一発露骨に狙ってますもんねこの人です

segments.text: Well, whether that landed clean or not, hard to say—critical hit! Ribcage shattered!
segments.original_text: まあ本当に当ててよかったかダメだったかもしれねー クリティカルヒットあばら骨複雑粉砕骨折

segments.text: Nah wait, that's not the ribs—that's gotta be the spine!
segments.original_text: あばらじゃねーな 背中にあるこれは背骨だなぁ

full_text: Yeah, early on Kuumaar's obviously gunning for that one hit Well, whether that landed clean or not, hard to say—critical hit! Ribcage shattered! Perfect! Nah wait, that's not the ribs—that's gotta be the spine!

corrections.original: アーバラ骨複雑分細骨折
corrections.corrected: あばら骨複雑粉砕骨折
